Container.Name: Agent BlindPass Redis
Container.Overview: Ephemeral Redis store used by Agent BlindPass SPS for short-lived encrypted payloads.
Container.Requires: Place this container and the SPS container on the same custom Docker network so REDIS_URL can use the hostname blindpass-redis.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Optional Redis data directory. For purely ephemeral Redis, you can remove this mapping in the Unraid UI.
